projects.lastPublishSubject: steady-state, NO push: attentionKey SHRANK to a strict subset of last journal (secretary's own 'ageing' warn cleared — this run is the fresh tick) → no novel key, all 4 items already notified 19:01Z. Reds triaged, none newly actionable: (1) auditor:stale 23h — fired healthy 08:06Z (nextRun 07-15 08:05Z) but made no commit; its probe is gitAny(holdetBot) and the bot's last commit is 23:18Z overnight batch. Same CONFIG-CADENCE FALSE POSITIVE flagged yesterday (config cadence 'Every 5h'/periodHours 5 vs scheduler cron '0 10 * * *' = DAILY) — it merely aged warn→red as the day passed; no new evidence of failure. Cannot self-fix: periodHours is config beyond the allowlist. (2) DNS guard:stale 13d — guard.log untouched since 07-02 08:30; launchctl confirms NO com.holdet.tdf.dns* label exists to kickstart → flag-only, already notified. (3) improve:error — 'fatal: last is not defined', another-repo code bug → flag-only, never patch. NEW DIAGNOSTIC (root cause of the improve red, reported not pushed): holdet-bot has 2 uncommitted files (dashboard/template.html +175 lines, dashboard/IMPROVEMENTS.md, both from the 07-14 04:2x dashboard-improve run) and improve.js is now logging 'tracked source has uncommitted changes — skipping auto-merge to avoid clobbering' → the dirty tree is BLOCKING every improve auto-merge. Cleaning it is outside the allowlist (another repo) → needs Alexander. Warn dashboard-improve:ageing = the known daily-cron-vs-config-8h twin false positive (ran healthy 02:08Z). Scheduler overlay otherwise clean: all 5 present launchd services exit-0, watch sentinel fresh (21:50Z, no stall), every enabled+due MCP producer fired on cadence with future nextRunAt, tonight's evening batch in flight and not yet due to commit — NO silent failure. Two enabled-drifts (config=paused, scheduler=enabled: retired stock relic + maintenance-and-improvements) unchanged and left unflipped per precedent — they are pending-retirement decisions, and flipping them green would dress up daily waste as healthy ('honest over tidy'). No allowlisted action available.
